user_query: I'm a student researching the crypto market. Fetch the latest news articles from Crypto News Live_v2 and give me the details of each article. Additionally, I'm interested in the news from Sky News Arabic. Retrieve the news articles and provide me with the headlines, content, and URLs.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest news articles from Crypto News Live_v2, including details of each article.
Retrieve news articles from Sky News Arabic, including headlines, content, and URLs.
